mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, field_name, field_value, created_at, updated_at FROM user_match_preferences WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY field_name, field_value
SELECT id, user_id, field_name, field_value, created_at, updated_at FROM user_match_preferences WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND field_name = #{fieldName} ORDER BY field_value
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_match_preferences (user_id, field_name, field_value, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{fieldName}, #{fieldValue}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO user_match_preferences (user_id, field_name, field_value, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{preference.userId}, #{preference.fieldName}, #{preference.fieldValue}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
